ambiguities.source_text: Total Sales for each Store and Product Type
Prepare your data sets for joining together by choosing your next step
ambiguities.ref: Standardize casing (title case) for Store and Product before join

ambiguities.source_text: Calculate whether each product in each store beats the target

ambiguities.intent: If no target exists for a store-product combination, Beats Target = False.

ambiguities.source_text: Remove unnecessary values from the Product Name field to just leave the Product Type
ambiguities.ref: Product Type = split on ' - ', take first part

ambiguities.source_text: Join the data sets together and remove any duplicated fields
ambiguities.ref:
result = sales_summary.merge(
    targets_long[['STORE', 'PRODUCT', 'Target']],
    left_on=['Store Name', 'Product Type'],
    right_on=['STORE', 'PRODUCT'],
    how='left'
)

ambiguities.source_text: Change the Targets data set into three columns
